episodes.title: A Cult Enthusiast's Warning Signs... That You're in a Cult with Teresa Morrison
episodes.description: Are you in a cult? Not sure? Nicole and her guest, Teresa Morrison, are here to help you figure it out and escape. On top of being a comedian, improviser and actress, Teresa has become quite the cult enthusiast... and may have converted Nicole too. The duo watched the documentary Escaping Twin Flames and they dissect the documentary as they delve into the psychological manipulation behind cults. With the rise of influencers, company cultures, and our own vulnerabilities, we are all susceptible to wanting to find our people and our purpose in community. Unfortunately some people take advantage of that, but Nicole and Teresa will provide you with the red flags you need to be aware of to steer clear of cults and maybe join theirs. ▶️ Subscribe to My Crunchy Zen Era for weekly dives into life's beautiful mess and the chaos that makes it all worthwhile.
